verses.text: The kings east of Jordan whom Moses smote are listed. East kings. Past victories are recorded.
The kings east of Jordan whom Moses smote are listed. East kings. Past victories are recorded.
The kings east of Jordan whom Moses smote are listed. East kings. Past victories are recorded.
Og and Sihon's lands were given to the eastern tribes. Given. The east was already won.
Og and Sihon's lands were given to the eastern tribes. Given. The east was already won.
Og and Sihon's lands were given to the eastern tribes. Given. The east was already won.
The kings west of Jordan, whom Joshua smote. West kings. The conquest is summed.
The kings west of Jordan, whom Joshua smote. West kings. The conquest is summed.
King after king is named among the thirty-one conquered. Conquered. God gave them all into Israel's hand.
